# feat(trust): canonical audit store with AuditEvent dataclass (SPEC-08)

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `32d947e2d206` — feat(trust): canonical audit store with AuditEvent dataclass (SPEC-08)

**Body**:

Replaces the loosely-typed audit dict with a frozen AuditEvent
dataclass (timestamp, agent_id, operation, resource, outcome,
details, envelope_hash). Three store backends: InMemoryAuditStore
(bounded deque, maxlen=10000), SqliteAuditStore (parameterized
queries, 0o600 perms), and the existing FileAuditStore.

Trust __init__.py and posture __init__.py updated to re-export
canonical types. 65 unit tests covering frozen semantics,
serialization round-trip, store CRUD, capacity bounds, and
SQLite concurrency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
